modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks non-English as their first language.
You should write the description in symptom-first manner and use a short and minimal tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show strong technical proficiency. There should be distracting grammar usage and some repeated wording or phrases.

short_description_text: Inquiry about "basic" settings in Google Blogger

full_description_text:  
User is asking about "basic" settings in Google Blogger. They want to know what these settings are. There is confusion regarding the features available in this section.
